debug_info.goal:
P : Erdos392.Params
p : ℕ
hp : p ≤ Erdos392.Params.n P / Erdos392.Params.L P
hp' : ↑p > √↑(Erdos392.Params.n P)
⊢ Erdos392.Factorization.balance (Erdos392.Params.n P) (Erdos392.Params.initial P) p ≥ -↑(Erdos392.Params.M P)

failed_attempts:
by_cases hprime : p.Prime
  · have hp_pos : 0 < p := hprime.pos
    have hn_pos : 0 < P.n := by exact_mod_cast P.hL.trans (lt_trans (Nat.mul_pos P.hL_pos P.hL_pos) (le_refl _))
    have h_smooth : ∀ m ∈ Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n, p ∣ m → m ∈ (P.n / P.L).smoothNumbers := fun m hm hpm ↦ by
      rw [mem_smoothNumbers]
      refine ⟨pos_of_ne_zero fun h ↦ by subst h; simp at hm, fun q hq hqm ↦ ?_⟩
      by_cases hqp : q = p; · subst hqp; exact hp
      have : m < p * p := lt_of_lt_of_le (Multiset.mem_Ico.mp hm).2 (by norm_cast; rw [Real.sq]; exact (lt_trim_iff P.hL.le P.hL.le).mpr (pow_two _ ▸ (Real.lt_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg _)).mp hp'))
      exact (Nat.le_of_dvd (div_pos (Nat.le_of_dvd (pos_of_ne_zero fun h => by subst h; simp at hm) hpm) hp_pos)
        (dvd_div_iff_mul_dvd hpm |>.mpr hqm)).trans ((Nat.div_lt_of_lt_mul this).le.trans (le_of_lt hp'))
    have h_val : ∀ m ∈ P.initial.a, m.factorization p = if p ∣ m then 1 else 0 := fun m hm ↦ by
      split_ifs with h; · refine Nat.factorization_eq_of_dvd_of_not_dvd_pow hprime.ne_zero hprime h fun h2 ↦ ?_
        have : m < p^2 := lt_of_le_of_lt (P.initial.ha m hm) (by norm_cast; rw [Real.sq]; exact (lt_trim_iff P.hL.le P.hL.le).mpr (pow_two _ ▸ (Real.lt_sqrt (Nat.cast_nonneg _)).mp hp'))
        exact (Nat.le_of_dvd (P.initial.hpos m hm) h2).not_lt this
      · exact Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_dvd h
    have h_sum : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum = P.M * ((P.n + p - 1) / p - (P.n - P.n / P.M + p - 1) / p) := by
      rw [Multiset.sum_congr rfl h_val, Params.initial, Multiset.sum_map_ite, Multiset.sum_zero, add_zero,
        Multiset.map_const, Multiset.sum_replicate, smul_eq_mul, mul_one, Multiset.filter_filter]
      convert congrArg (P.M * ·) (Multiset.card_filter _ _) using 2
      · apply Multiset.filter_congr; intro m hm; simp [h_smooth m (Multiset.mem_replicate.mp (Multiset.mem_join.mp hm).1).2]
      · rw [Multiset.countP_eq_card_filter, Multiset.card_join, Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_replicate,
          Multiset.Ico_filter_dvd, Finset.card_image_of_injective _ (mul_left_injective₀ hprime.ne_zero), Finset.card_Ico]
    rw [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, factorial_factorization_eq_div hprime hp', h_sum]
    rw [ge_iff_le, le_sub_iff_add_le, ← Int.ofNat_add, ← Int.ofNat_mul]
    norm_cast
    refine le_trans ?_ (Nat.mul_le_mul_left P.M (by
      let A := P.n - 1; let B := P.n - P.n / P.M - 1
      have h : P.n / P.M = A - B := by
        simp only [A, B]
        have : 1 ≤ P.n - P.n / P.M := Nat.le_sub_of_add_le_left (by
          exact (Nat.add_le_add_right (Nat.div_le_self P.n P.M) 1).trans (by linarith [P.hL]))
        rw [Nat.sub_sub, Nat.add_comm, ← Nat.sub_sub, Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.div_le_self _ _)]
        exact Nat.sub_sub_self this
      rw [show (P.n + p - 1)/p = A/p + 1 by simp [A]; rw [← Nat.add_div_right _ hp_pos, Nat.sub_add_cancel hn_pos]],
      rw [show (P.n - P.n/P.M + p - 1)/p = B/p + 1 by simp [B]; rw [← Nat.add_div_right _ hp_pos, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.le_sub_of_add_le_left (by linarith [P.hL]))]],
      rw [Nat.add_sub_add_right, h]; exact Nat.le_div_sub_div_add_one _ _ _))
    rw [Nat.sub_sub_self (Nat.div_le_self _ _), Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le hp_pos, mul_add, mul_comm p P.M, ← mul_assoc,
      ← Nat.div_eq_sub_rem (P.n / P.M) p, mul_comm, ← Nat.div_eq_sub_rem P.n (P.M * p), Nat.div_div_eq_div_mul]
    exact Nat.div_le_div_right (Nat.sub_le_self _ _)
  · simp [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum, Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hprime]
    exact (Multiset.sum_eq_zero fun m _ ↦ Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_not_prime _ hprime) ▸ by linarith
